utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs; plan names and combined monthly cost are provided—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs; it includes home_contents with plan name and monthly cost—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs; plan name and monthly cost—fully specified. (4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs; several services listed with individual costs and a summarized cost, including a one-time fee—fully specified. (5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; monthly, annual, and one-time cost are provided—fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items named in the final coverage plan and match them exactly to the ground-truth catalog to retrieve their ratings. The plan includes: EliteCare Premium Plan for physical health, EliteCare Premium Plan for mental health, EliteHome Premium Coverage for home contents, PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel, Premium Medical Network, Premium Insurance Membership, Claims Advocacy Service, HealthFirst Standard Plan (Isabella physical next year), and InsurePlus Standard Plan (Isabella mental next year). Map each to its corresponding rating number.
